Screens:
  scr_Dashboard:
    Properties:
      OnVisible: |-
        =Refresh(SPList_GatePass_GPDetails);
        Set(locSidebarSelectedKey, 3);
    Children:
      - con_scr_Dashboard:
          Control: GroupContainer@1.5.0
          Variant: AutoLayout
          Properties:
            Fill: =RGBA(241, 241, 241, 1)
            Height: =Parent.Height
            LayoutDirection: =LayoutDirection.Horizontal
            Width: =Parent.Width
          Children:
            - scr_Dashboard_Sidebar:
                Control: GroupContainer@1.5.0
                Variant: AutoLayout
                Properties:
                  AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.Start
                  Fill: =RGBA(255, 255, 255, 1)
                  FillPortions: =0
                  Height: =Parent.Height
                  LayoutDirection: =LayoutDirection.Vertical
                  LayoutGap: =10
                  LayoutJustifyContent: =LayoutJustifyContent.SpaceBetween
                  LayoutMaxHeight: =
                  LayoutMaxWidth: =
                  LayoutMinWidth: =50
                  Width: =If(scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small,Parent.Width / 1.8,80)
                Children:
                  - img_Ortec_Logo_scr_Dashboard:
                      Control: Image@2.2.3
                      Properties:
                        AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.Center
                        Height: =90
                        Image: ="data:image/jpeg;base64,"
                        LayoutMaxHeight: =
                        LayoutMaxWidth: =
                        Width: =54
                  - avt_User_Visualize_scr_Dashboard:
                      Control: Avatar@1.0.40
                      Properties:
                        AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.Center
                        Appearance: ='Avatar.Appearance'.Neutral
                        Badge: ='Avatar.Badge'.None
                        Height: =90
                        LayoutMaxHeight: =
                        LayoutMaxWidth: =
                        Shape: ='Avatar.Shape'.Circular
                        Visible: =scr_Dashboard.Size <> ScreenSize.Small
                        Width: =If(scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small,32,40)
            - scr_Dashboard_Main:
                Control: GroupContainer@1.5.0
                Variant: AutoLayout
                Properties:
                  LayoutDirection: =LayoutDirection.Vertical
                  LayoutMaxHeight: =
                  LayoutMaxWidth: =
                  PaddingBottom: |-
                    =//If(scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small,fxSizeParameters.Mobile.Padding.MainContainer,fxSizeParameters.Desktop.Padding.MainContainer)
                    20
                  PaddingLeft: |-
                    =//If(scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small,fxSizeParameters.Mobile.Padding.MainContainer,fxSizeParameters.Desktop.Padding.MainContainer)
                    20
                  PaddingRight: |-
                    =//If(scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small,fxSizeParameters.Mobile.Padding.MainContainer,fxSizeParameters.Desktop.Padding.MainContainer)
                    20
                  Visible: =scr_Dashboard.Size <> ScreenSize.Small || !locIsMobileMenuVisible
                Children:
                  - scr_Dashboard_Header:
                      Control: GroupContainer@1.5.0
                      Variant: AutoLayout
                      Properties:
                        DropShadow: =DropShadow.None
                        FillPortions: =0
                        Height: =If(Self.LayoutDirection = LayoutDirection.Horizontal,80,60)
                        LayoutAlignItems: =LayoutAlignItems.Center
                        LayoutDirection: =If(scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small,LayoutDirection.Vertical,LayoutDirection.Horizontal)
                        LayoutMaxHeight: =
                        LayoutMaxWidth: =
                        LayoutMinHeight: =90
                        LayoutMinWidth: =0
                      Children:
                        - scr_Dashboard_First_Header:
                            Control: GroupContainer@1.5.0
                            Variant: AutoLayout
                            Properties:
                              AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.SetByContainer
                              DropShadow: =DropShadow.None
                              Height: =If(Parent.LayoutDirection = LayoutDirection.Vertical,(Parent.Height/2) - Parent.LayoutGap,Parent.Height)
                              LayoutAlignItems: =LayoutAlignItems.Center
                              LayoutDirection: =LayoutDirection.Horizontal
                              LayoutMaxHeight: =
                              LayoutMaxWidth: =
                              LayoutMinHeight: =50
                              Width: =If(Parent.LayoutDirection = LayoutDirection.Vertical,Parent.Width,(Parent.Width/2)-Parent.LayoutGap)
                            Children:
                              - ico_Header_Hamburger_scr_Dashboard:
                                  Control: Classic/Icon@2.5.0
                                  Properties:
                                    Height: =24
                                    Icon: =Icon.Hamburger
                                    LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                    LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                    OnSelect: |-
                                      =UpdateContext({locIsMobileMenuVisible: !locIsMobileMenuVisible})
                                    Visible: |-
                                      =//'Visualize Data Screen'.Size = ScreenSize.Small
                                      false
                                    Width: =24
                              - lbl_Header_Title_scr_Dashboard:
                                  Control: Text@0.0.51
                                  Properties:
                                    AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.Center
                                    FontColor: =RGBA(51, 51, 51, 1)
                                    Height: =50
                                    LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                    LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                    PaddingLeft: =0
                                    Size: |-
                                      =//If('scr_Dashboard'.Size = ScreenSize.Small,fxSizeParameters.Mobile.FontSize.ScreenTitle,fxSizeParameters.Desktop.FontSize.ScreenTitle)
                                      20
                                    Text: ="Gate Pass Application"
                                    VerticalAlign: =VerticalAlign.Middle
                                    Weight: ='TextCanvas.Weight'.Bold
                                    Width: |-
                                      =If(
                                          scr_Dashboard_Header.LayoutDirection = LayoutDirection.Vertical,
                                          Parent.Width - (ico_Header_Hamburger_scr_Dashboard.Width+avt_User_scr_Dashboard.Width) - (2*Parent.LayoutGap),
                                          Parent.Width
                                      )
                              - avt_User_scr_Dashboard:
                                  Control: Avatar@1.0.40
                                  Properties:
                                    Appearance: ='Avatar.Appearance'.Neutral
                                    Badge: ='Avatar.Badge'.None
                                    Height: =Parent.Height
                                    LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                    LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                    Shape: ='Avatar.Shape'.Circular
                                    Visible: =false
                                    Width: =If(scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small,32,40)
                  - scr_Dashboard_Body:
                      Control: GroupContainer@1.5.0
                      Variant: AutoLayout
                      Properties:
                        AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.Start
                        DropShadow: =DropShadow.None
                        Fill: =RGBA(255, 255, 255, 1)
                        LayoutDirection: =LayoutDirection.Vertical
                        LayoutGap: =10
                        LayoutMaxHeight: =
                        LayoutMaxWidth: =
                        PaddingBottom: =10
                        PaddingLeft: =10
                        PaddingRight: =10
                        PaddingTop: =10
                        Width: =Parent.Width - (Parent.PaddingLeft + Parent.PaddingRight)
                      Children:
                        - scr_Dashboard_Body_Menu:
                            Control: GroupContainer@1.5.0
                            Variant: AutoLayout
                            Properties:
                              DropShadow: =DropShadow.None
                              FillPortions: =0.1
                              Height: =
                              LayoutDirection: =LayoutDirection.Horizontal
                              LayoutMaxHeight: =
                              LayoutMaxWidth: =
                              LayoutMinHeight: =50
                              LayoutMinWidth: =Parent.Width - (Parent.PaddingBottom + Parent.PaddingTop + Parent.PaddingLeft + Parent.PaddingRight)
                            Children:
                              - lbl_Body_Title_Template:
                                  Control: Text@0.0.51
                                  Properties:
                                    Align: ='TextCanvas.Align'.Start
                                    AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.Center
                                    Font: =Font.'Open Sans'
                                    FontColor: =RGBA(51, 51, 51, 1)
                                    LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                    LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                    PaddingLeft: =20
                                    Size: =//If(scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small,fxSizeParameters.Mobile.FontSize.SectionTitle,fxSizeParameters.Desktop.FontSize.SectionTitle)
                                    Text: ="Dashboard"
                                    VerticalAlign: =VerticalAlign.Middle
                                    Weight: ='TextCanvas.Weight'.Semibold
                                    Width: =Parent.Width - tlb_Body_Menu_Template.Width
                                    Wrap: =false
                              - tlb_Body_Menu_Template:
                                  Control: Toolbar@2.0.5
                                  Properties:
                                    AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.Center
                                    Height: =Parent.Height - 10
                                    Items: "=Table(\n    {\n        ItemKey: \"new\",\n        ItemDisplayName: \"Create New Gate Pass\",\n        ItemIconName: \"Add\",\n        ItemAppearance: \"Primary\",\n        ItemIconStyle: \"Regular\",\n        ItemTooltip: \"Add new item\"\n         \n    },\n    {\n        ItemKey: \"reset\",\n        ItemDisplayName: \"Reset\",\n        ItemIconName: \"ArrowClockwise\",\n        ItemAppearance: \"Subtle\",\n        ItemIconStyle: \"Regular\"\n    },\n    {\n        ItemKey: \"view\",\n        ItemDisplayName: \"View\",\n        ItemIconName: \"Eye\",\n        ItemAppearance: \"Primary\",\n        ItemIconStyle: \"Regular\",\n        ItemDisabled: IsBlank(tbl_Items_scr_Dashboard.Selected)\n        \n    }\n)"
                                    Layout: =If(scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small,'Toolbar.Layout'.IconOnly,'Toolbar.Layout'.IconBefore)
                                    LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                    LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                    LayoutMinWidth: =150
                                    OnSelect: |+
                                      =Switch(
                                          Self.Selected.ItemKey,

                                          "new",
                                      Set(gblFormMode, FormMode.New);
                                      NewForm(Detail_Form);
                                      Set(gblSelectedRow, Defaults(SPList_GatePass_GPDetails));
                                      Navigate(scr_Detail, ScreenTransition.Fade);
                                      Set(gblVisible,false);
                                      Set(gblCurrentSelectedItem1, Blank());

                                          "reset",
                                              Refresh(SPList_GatePass_GPDetails);
                                              Reset(cmb_Filter_PassID);
                                              Reset(cmb_Filter_PassType);
                                          "view",
                                              If(
                                                  !IsBlank(tbl_Items_scr_Dashboard.Selected),
                                                  Set(gblSelectedRow, tbl_Items_scr_Dashboard.Selected);
                                                  Set(gblFormMode, FormMode.View);
                                                  Navigate(scr_Detail, ScreenTransition.Fade));
                                                  Set(gblCurrentSelectedItem1,Blank());
                                      )
                                    Padding: ='Toolbar.Padding'.Large
                                    Width: =If(scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small,Max(50,Parent.Width*0.33),450)
                        - scr_Dashboard_Body_Filter:
                            Control: GroupContainer@1.5.0
                            Variant: AutoLayout
                            Properties:
                              FillPortions: =0
                              Height: =If(scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small, 160,80)
                              LayoutDirection: =LayoutDirection.Horizontal
                              LayoutGap: =10
                              LayoutMaxHeight: =
                              LayoutMaxWidth: =
                              LayoutMinHeight: =50
                              LayoutMinWidth: =Parent.Width - (Parent.PaddingBottom + Parent.PaddingTop + Parent.PaddingLeft + Parent.PaddingRight)
                              LayoutWrap: =true
                              PaddingBottom: =10
                              PaddingLeft: =10
                              PaddingRight: =10
                              PaddingTop: =10
                              RadiusBottomLeft: =0
                              RadiusBottomRight: =0
                              RadiusTopLeft: =0
                              RadiusTopRight: =0
                            Children:
                              - con_scr_Dashboard_Body_Filter_PassID:
                                  Control: GroupContainer@1.5.0
                                  Variant: AutoLayout
                                  Properties:
                                    AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.SetByContainer
                                    DropShadow: =DropShadow.None
                                    Height: =60
                                    LayoutAlignItems: =LayoutAlignItems.Stretch
                                    LayoutDirection: =LayoutDirection.Vertical
                                    LayoutJustifyContent: =LayoutJustifyContent.SpaceBetween
                                    LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                    LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                    LayoutMinWidth: =If(scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small,Parent.Width - Parent.PaddingLeft - Parent.PaddingRight,250)
                                    RadiusBottomLeft: =0
                                    RadiusBottomRight: =0
                                    RadiusTopLeft: =0
                                    RadiusTopRight: =0
                                    Width: =Parent.Width / 2
                                    X: =20
                                    Y: =10
                                  Children:
                                    - con_Filter_PassID:
                                        Control: GroupContainer@1.5.0
                                        Variant: AutoLayout
                                        Properties:
                                          AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.SetByContainer
                                          BorderStyle: =BorderStyle.None
                                          DropShadow: =DropShadow.None
                                          FillPortions: =0
                                          Height: =Parent.Height /2
                                          LayoutAlignItems: =LayoutAlignItems.Center
                                          LayoutDirection: =LayoutDirection.Horizontal
                                          LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                          LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                          LayoutMinHeight: =
                                          RadiusBottomLeft: =0
                                          RadiusBottomRight: =0
                                          RadiusTopLeft: =0
                                          RadiusTopRight: =0
                                        Children:
                                          - lbl_Filter_PassID:
                                              Control: Text@0.0.51
                                              Properties:
                                                Align: ='TextCanvas.Align'.Center
                                                AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.Stretch
                                                FillPortions: =1
                                                Height: =40
                                                LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                                LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                                LayoutMinHeight: =Parent.Height /4
                                                Size: =13
                                                Text: ="Gate Pass No"
                                                VerticalAlign: =VerticalAlign.Middle
                                                Weight: ='TextCanvas.Weight'.Semibold
                                                Wrap: =false
                                          - btn_Filter_PassID:
                                              Control: Button@0.0.45
                                              Properties:
                                                AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.Stretch
                                                Appearance: ='ButtonCanvas.Appearance'.Transparent
                                                Icon: ="Eraser"
                                                Layout: ='ButtonCanvas.Layout'.IconOnly
                                                LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                                LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                                LayoutMinHeight: =Parent.Height /4
                                                LayoutMinWidth: =35
                                                OnSelect: |
                                                  =Reset(cmb_Filter_PassID);
                                                Visible: =If(IsBlank(cmb_Filter_PassID.Selected), false, true)
                                                Width: =30
                                    - cmb_Filter_PassID:
                                        Control: ComboBox@0.0.51
                                        Properties:
                                          Appearance: ='ComboboxCanvas.Appearance'.FilledDarker
                                          FontSize: =11
                                          Height: =Parent.Height /2
                                          InputTextPlaceholder: ="Filter Gate Pass No"
                                          IsSearchable: =false
                                          Items: =Distinct(SPList_GatePass_GPDetails,GatePassNo)
                                          LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                          LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                          LayoutMinHeight: =0
                                          LayoutMinWidth: =50
                                          TriggerOutput: ='ComboboxCanvas.TriggerOutput'.Delayed
                                          Width: =Parent.Width
                                          X: =40
                                          Y: =40
                                        Children:
                                          - Value:
                                              Control: ComboBoxDataField@1.5.0
                                              Variant: textualColumn
                                              IsLocked: true
                                              Properties:
                                                FieldDisplayName: ="Value"
                                                FieldName: ="Value"
                                                FieldType: ="s"
                                                Order: =1
                              - con_scr_Dashboard_Body_Filter_PassType:
                                  Control: GroupContainer@1.5.0
                                  Variant: AutoLayout
                                  Properties:
                                    AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.SetByContainer
                                    DropShadow: =DropShadow.None
                                    Height: =60
                                    LayoutDirection: =LayoutDirection.Vertical
                                    LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                    LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                    LayoutMinWidth: =If(scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small,Parent.Width - Parent.PaddingLeft - Parent.PaddingRight,250)
                                    X: =20
                                    Y: =10
                                  Children:
                                    - con_Filter_PassType:
                                        Control: GroupContainer@1.5.0
                                        Variant: AutoLayout
                                        Properties:
                                          BorderStyle: =BorderStyle.None
                                          DropShadow: =DropShadow.None
                                          FillPortions: =0
                                          Height: =Parent.Height /2
                                          LayoutAlignItems: =LayoutAlignItems.Center
                                          LayoutDirection: =LayoutDirection.Horizontal
                                          LayoutGap: =5
                                          LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                          LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                          LayoutMinHeight: =
                                          RadiusBottomLeft: =0
                                          RadiusBottomRight: =0
                                          RadiusTopLeft: =0
                                          RadiusTopRight: =0
                                        Children:
                                          - lbl_Filter_PassType:
                                              Control: Text@0.0.51
                                              Properties:
                                                Align: ='TextCanvas.Align'.Center
                                                AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.Stretch
                                                FillPortions: =1
                                                Height: =40
                                                LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                                LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                                LayoutMinHeight: =Parent.Height /4
                                                Size: =13
                                                Text: ="Gate Pass Type"
                                                VerticalAlign: =VerticalAlign.Middle
                                                Weight: ='TextCanvas.Weight'.Semibold
                                                Width: =Parent.Width
                                                Wrap: =false
                                          - btn_Filter_PassType:
                                              Control: Button@0.0.45
                                              Properties:
                                                AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.Stretch
                                                Appearance: ='ButtonCanvas.Appearance'.Transparent
                                                Icon: ="Eraser"
                                                Layout: ='ButtonCanvas.Layout'.IconOnly
                                                LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                                LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                                LayoutMinWidth: =35
                                                OnSelect: |
                                                  =Reset(cmb_Filter_PassType);
                                                Visible: =If(IsBlank(cmb_Filter_PassType.Selected), false, true)
                                                Width: =30
                                    - cmb_Filter_PassType:
                                        Control: ComboBox@0.0.51
                                        Properties:
                                          Appearance: ='ComboboxCanvas.Appearance'.FilledDarker
                                          FontSize: =11
                                          Height: =Parent.Height /2
                                          InputTextPlaceholder: ="Filter Gate Type"
                                          IsSearchable: =false
                                          Items: =Choices(SPList_GatePass_GPDetails.'Gate Pass Type')
                                          LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                          LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                          LayoutMinHeight: =0
                                          LayoutMinWidth: =50
                                          TriggerOutput: ='ComboboxCanvas.TriggerOutput'.Delayed
                                          Width: =Parent.Width
                                          X: =40
                                          Y: =40
                                        Children:
                                          - Value1:
                                              Control: ComboBoxDataField@1.5.0
                                              Variant: textualColumn
                                              IsLocked: true
                                              Properties:
                                                FieldDisplayName: ="Value"
                                                FieldName: ="Value"
                                                FieldType: ="s"
                                                Order: =1
                        - scr_Dashboard_Form:
                            Control: GroupContainer@1.5.0
                            Variant: AutoLayout
                            Properties:
                              DropShadow: =DropShadow.None
                              LayoutDirection: =LayoutDirection.Vertical
                              LayoutGap: =10
                              LayoutMaxHeight: =
                              LayoutMaxWidth: =
                              LayoutOverflowY: =LayoutOverflow.Scroll
                              Width: =Parent.Width - (Parent.PaddingLeft+Parent.PaddingRight)
                            Children:
                              - tbl_Items_scr_Dashboard:
                                  Control: Table@1.0.278
                                  Properties:
                                    AlignInContainer: =AlignInContainer.Stretch
                                    ContentLanguage: ="en-US"
                                    EnableSorting: =If(scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small, 'PowerAppsOneGrid.EnableSorting'.Disable,'PowerAppsOneGrid.EnableSorting'.Enable)
                                    FillPortions: =1
                                    Items: |
                                      =SortByColumns(
                                          Filter(
                                              SPList_GatePass_GPDetails,
                                              IsBlank(cmb_Filter_PassID.Selected.Value) || GatePassNo = cmb_Filter_PassID.Selected.Value,
                                              IsBlank(cmb_Filter_PassType.Selected.Value) || 'Gate Pass Type'.Value = cmb_Filter_PassType.Selected.Value
                                          ),
                                          "Created",
                                          SortOrder.Descending
                                      )
                                    LayoutMaxHeight: =
                                    LayoutMaxWidth: =
                                    OnSelect: |-
                                      =Set(
                                          gblCurrentSelectedItem,
                                          tbl_Items_scr_Dashboard.Selected
                                      );
                                    ShowAvatar: ="no"
                                  Children:
                                    - Status:
                                        Control: TableDataField@1.5.0
                                        Variant: textualColumn
                                        IsLocked: true
                                        Properties:
                                          FieldDisplayName: ="Status"
                                          FieldName: ="Status"
                                          FieldType: ="E"
                                          Order: =4
                                    - ReceiverName1:
                                        Control: TableDataField@1.5.0
                                        Variant: textualColumn
                                        IsLocked: true
                                        Properties:
                                          FieldDisplayName: ="ReceiverName"
                                          FieldName: ="ReceiverName"
                                          FieldType: ="s"
                                          Order: =5
                                    - Requested Date1:
                                        Control: TableDataField@1.5.0
                                        Variant: textualColumn
                                        IsLocked: true
                                        Properties:
                                          FieldDisplayName: ="Requested Date"
                                          FieldName: ="Date"
                                          FieldType: ="D"
                                          Order: =6
                                    - Return Type1:
                                        Control: TableDataField@1.5.0
                                        Variant: textualColumn
                                        IsLocked: true
                                        Properties:
                                          FieldDisplayName: ="Return Type"
                                          FieldName: ="AssetType"
                                          FieldType: ="E"
                                          Order: =7
                                    - Gate Pass Type1:
                                        Control: TableDataField@1.5.0
                                        Variant: textualColumn
                                        IsLocked: true
                                        Properties:
                                          FieldDisplayName: ="Gate Pass Type"
                                          FieldName: ="FormType"
                                          FieldType: ="E"
                                          Order: =6
                                    - GatePassNo1:
                                        Control: TableDataField@1.5.0
                                        Variant: textualColumn
                                        IsLocked: true
                                        Properties:
                                          FieldDisplayName: ="GatePassNo"
                                          FieldName: ="GatePassNo"
                                          FieldType: ="s"
                                          Order: =3
            - rct_Mobile_Close_Menu_scr_Dashboard:
                Control: Rectangle@2.3.0
                Properties:
                  Height: =Parent.Height
                  LayoutMaxHeight: =
                  LayoutMaxWidth: =
                  OnSelect: |-
                    =UpdateContext({locIsMobileMenuVisible: false})
                  Visible: =scr_Dashboard.Size = ScreenSize.Small && locIsMobileMenuVisible
                  Width: =Parent.Width - con_scr_Dashboard.Width
